mapper.sql: t.id, t.refund_task_no, t.order_id, t.refund_amount, t.currency, t.refund_status, t.config_version_no, t.refund_id, t.fail_reason, t.manual_audit_status, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vso_config_change_refund ( refund_task_no, order_id, refund_amount, currency, refund_status, config_version_no, refund_id, fail_reason, manual_audit_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES
( #{item.refundTaskNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.refundAmount}, #{item.currency}, #{item.refundStatus}, #{item.configVersionNo}, #{item.refundId}, #{item.failReason}, #{item.manualAuditStatus}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.updateBy} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_config_change_refund t SET
t.refund_status = #{refundStatus},
t.refund_id = #{refundId},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.manual_audit_status = #{manualAuditStatus},
t.update_by = #{updateBy},
t.update_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
